description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker/compose image with a docker:dind service and a shared before_script that runs: docker login -u $CI_REGISTRY_USER -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY; apk update; apk add git openssh-client; mkdir -p ~/.ssh && chmod 700 ~/.ssh; ssh-keyscan -H gitlab.com >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts; cd $ROOT; rm -rf data_store; echo Root Dir: $ROOT; echo Pipeline source: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE; echo Image Name: $IMG_NAME. Define variables DOCKER_CACHE=no, DOCKER_LAYER_CACHE=no, GIT_CLONE_PATH=$CI_BUILDS_DIR/root/exam_tools, GIT_DEPTH=2, IMG_COMPARE=${CI_COMMIT_BRANCH}${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_NAME}, IMG_NAME=${CI_COMMIT_BRANCH}${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_NAME}, PROJECT_DIR=exam_tools, PROJ_REG=$CI_REGISTRY/$CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE/$CI_PROJECT_NAME/master-test, ROOT=$CI_BUILDS_DIR/root. Set up three stages: build, test, push, and include external job definitions from .gitlab/ci/test.yml and .gitlab/ci/docker-build.yml. Configure the workflow to run only for pipeline sources "web", "schedule", or "merge_request_event".
